=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.02
Palais Theatre, Melbourne
Victoria, Australia

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-2

CD1

1 All Along The Watchtower 
2 Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You 
3 Everything Is Broken 
4 Just Like A Woman 
5 Tangled Up In Blue 
6 She Belongs To Me 
7 Maggie's Farm 
8 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 
9 Little Moses (acoustic) 
10 Trail Of The Buffalo (acoustic) 
11 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band)

CD2

1 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band) 
2 Cat's In The Well 
3 Idiot Wind 
4 Highway 61 Revisited 
5 Ballad Of A Thin Man 
6 Absolutely Sweet Marie 
7 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 


8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
10  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal) & John Jackson (guitar).
11, 12 acoustic with the band.
4, 5, 8, 11, 12, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
5, 12  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
11  Bucky Baxter (dobro).
15  Bucky Baxter (electric slide guitar).

Note. First Idiot Wind since Salt Palace in Salt Lake City, 25 May 1976!!


BobTalk:
Thank you everybody! This is my farm song for tonight. (before Maggie's Farm).

Thank you everybody! That's the spiritual side of the show tonight. (after Little Moses).
